channel.title: Pages on hiddenbyte.log
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on hiddenbyte.log

item.title: About Me
item.description: Mehul Irá, Software Developer. Currently works at Mindera, previously at: SAPO/Portugal Telecom (now Altice Portugal), 2012-2015; URBANOS, 2012; BOLD Int, 2012-2015; and agap2, 2010-2012. You can also find him at: https://github.com/hiddenbyte https://twitter.com/hiddenbyte https://www.linkedin.com/in/mehulira About hiddenbyte.log Most of the log entries will be about Software Development.
